system.description:
Heroes. Champions. Legends!

Their examples inspire us to greatness.

LEVEL 3

Inspiring Tune. Whenever you use Songweaver's Inspiration, you may grant 2×WIL temp HP to yourself or the target.

Razor's Wit. If you would gain temp HP while your current amount is lower than LVL, you may combine the two amounts instead.

LEVEL 7

Battle Ballad. You and your allies within Reach 12 that can hear you gain WIL Psychic damage while having temp HP.

LEVEL 11

Solo. (1/encounter) Action: Embody the spirit of a legendary hero. Gain LVL+WIL temp HP. You cannot miss while Solo is active. Solo ends as soon as you run out of temp HP or at the end of the encounter.

LEVEL 15

Finale. (1/encounter) Action: Sacrifice all of your temp HP. Deal Psychic damage (ignoring armor) to an adjacent enemy equal to 3 times the amount sacrificed.
